channel.title: Codeforces on Leo101's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Codeforces on Leo101's blog

item.title: Codeforces734F Anton and School
item.description: 题面 Codeforces Luogu 题解 总而言之这题是真的神仙 首先看到这两个式子 b[i]=(a[i] and a[1])+(a[i] and a[2])+...+(a[i] and a[n]) c[i]=(a[i] or a[1])+(a[i] or a[2])+...+(a[i] or a[n]) 因为 (a and b) + (a or b) = a + b 所以 $$b[i] + c[i] = (\sum_{j = 1}^{n}{a[j]})+n*a[i]$$ 所以 $$ \sum_{i=1}^{n}=2*n*\sum_{i=1}^{n}{a[i]} $$ 所以 $$ \frac{\sum_{i = 1}^{n}{(b[i] +c[i])}}{2*n}{=\sum_{i = 1}^{n}{a[i]}} $$ 然后我们就可以得到所有 a[i] 的和了 然后再根据 $$ b[i] + c[i] = (\sum_{j = 1}^{n}{a[j]})+n *a[i] $$ 得到每一个 $a[i]$ 的值
